summary: Expanded evidence with full function/context for each call site into Seven/autonomous

matches.snippet: const result = await processAIRequest( { text: "auth login", trustZone: "public", ...payload }, env );

entries.context: export default { async fetch(request, env) { const url = new URL(request.url); // LOGIN if (url.pathname === "/auth/login" && request.method === "POST") { const payload = await request.json(); const result = await processAIRequest({ text: "auth login", trustZone: "public", ...payload }, env); return new Response(JSON.stringify(result), { status: 200, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }); } ... } }

matches.snippet: const result = await VoiceBus.dispatch({ text: message, role, sessionId, sensors, resources });

entries.context: export async function voiceFlightHandler(payload) { const { message, role = "farmer", sessionId = "local-demo", sensors = {}, resources = {} } = payload; if (!message) { return { displayText: "> SEVEN: No input detected.", spokenText: "I did not receive any input.", priority: "normal", mode: "rural", actions: [] }; } // Route everything through Seven’s unified voice bus const result = await VoiceBus.dispatch({ text: message, role, sessionId, sensors, resources }); return result; }

matches.snippet: if (isMission) { const mission = orchestrateMission({ text, role, sessionId, sensors: sensors || {}, resources: resources || {} }); return res.json(mission); }
const response = await generateSevenResponse({ text, role, sessionId });

entries.context: router.post('/', async (req, res) => { try { const { text, role, sessionId, sensors, resources } = req.body; ... if (isMission) { const mission = orchestrateMission({ text, role, sessionId, sensors: sensors || {}, resources: resources || {} }); return res.json(mission); } // Normal Voice Command → Seven Response Engine const response = await generateSevenResponse({ text, role, sessionId }); return res.json(response); } catch (err) { ... } });

matches.snippet: const terrain = new TerrainModel(); const stack = new SevenStack(terrain, { speak: (msg) => console.log('[Seven Voice]', msg) });

if (path === "/api/autonomous/task/enqueue") { const req = { ...request, url: request.url }; const inputBody = await request.json(); const response = await processAIRequest({ ...req, json: async () => ({ ...inputBody, workflow: "task-enqueue", taskType: inputBody.taskType, payload: inputBody.payload }) }, {}); return response; }
if (path === "/api/autonomous/task/process") { const response = await processAIRequest(request, { workflow: "task-process" }); return response; }

entries.context: router(request) { ... // autonomous task endpoints map to processAIRequest which routes into AI/autonomous engines; processAIRequest is the canonical gateway into Seven/Seven-of-Nine task processing. }

matches.snippet: if (isMission) { return orchestrateMission({ text, role, sessionId, sensors, resources }); }

entries.context: VoiceBus.dispatch decides whether input is a mission and delegates to orchestrateMission (mission builder/orchestrator) or generateSevenResponse (general voice response) — both are Seven integration points.

matches.snippet: const aiResponse = await fakeAI(finalPrompt); return aiResponse;

entries.context: runAI is a generic worker helper used by hubs and other components to call AI. Many workers call runAI or processAIRequest as the proxy into the autonomous/AI stack.

matches.snippet: export function orchestrateMission({ text, role, sessionId, sensors, resources }) { const grid = analyzeDisasterGrid({ text, sensors, role }); const plans = buildRescueAndSupplyPlan({ ... }); const mission = buildMissionObject({ grid, plans, role, sessionId }); return mission; }

entries.context: mission orchestrator builds mission objects used by voice and other frontends; orchestrateMission is often the call site that leads to mission actions which may enqueue autonomous tasks or call Seven runtime indirectly.

matches.snippet: async launchSectorMission(req: OrchestratorMissionRequest, safetyCtx: SafetyContext | null = null, disasterType: DisasterType | null = null) { const plan = await this.orchestrator.launchMission(req); ... }

entries.context: SevenRuntime.launchSectorMission is the runtime entrypoint used by higher-level services (SevenStack, safety API, responders) to actually launch drone/ground missions via the orchestrator and safety checks.

matches.snippet: this.narrator = new SevenNarrator(sink); const speakFn = (msg: string) => this.narrator.say(msg);

entries.context: SevenStack composes SevenRuntime and adapters (voice narrator, registries, rescue commander, interop). SevenStack instances are created by backend services (see backend/functions/api/system.js) and passed to routers that expose voice/audit endpoints.
